decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat early in the game. It includes a mix of card draw, countermagic, and disruption to protect the combo and control the game. The goal is to efficiently use spells like Opt and Counterspell to dig for pieces of the combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win through a fast and powerful play that overwhelms the opponent before they can react effectively.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly assemble a powerful threat while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and bounce spells. The deck also includes cantrips like Opt and Portent to dig for combo pieces, as well as utility spells like Chain of Vapor and Thwart for additional disruption. With the ability to protect its combo and disrupt opponents, this deck aims to win the game quickly and efficiently through a combination of tempo advantage and powerful threats.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Verdant Force, using cards like Buried Alive and Putrid Imp. The main goal is to bring these creatures back onto the battlefield for a low cost using cards like Reanimate and Exhume. Support cards like Unmask and Cabal Therapy help to disrupt the opponent's hand and facilitate the reanimation strategy. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large, difficult-to-deal-with threats and win the game swiftly.

The RG Aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient burn spells. By combining small, efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Quirion Dryad provide additional card advantage and potential growth for the creatures. Overall, the deck focuses on maintaining a fast pace and putting pressure on the opponent to win the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategies and removing threats through a combination of hand disruption, creature removal, and land destruction. It aims to control the board state and outvalue the opponent with powerful threats like Eternal Dragon and Exalted Angel. By efficiently managing resources and controlling the pace of the game, the deck looks to grind out incremental advantages and close out games with a combination of powerful removal spells and resilient creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with early aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, while disrupting their hand with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck also includes utility cards like Wasteland and Mishra's Factory to control the board, along with removal spells like Snuff Out and Diabolic Edict. The goal is to maintain constant pressure on the opponent while removing any threats they may have, ultimately leading to a quick victory through creature damage and hand disruption.

The deck focuses on using cards like Intuition and Attunement to fill the graveyard with key enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave. By using Replenish, the player can bring back multiple enchantments from the graveyard to the battlefield, creating a powerful board presence. Cards like Decree of Silence and Meddling Mage help control the opponent's plays, while cards like Swords to Plowshares provide removal. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a strong enchantment-based strategy.

The deck revolves around quickly assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat, while utilizing a suite of counterspells and card draw to protect it and dig for key pieces. The aim is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up a win condition that can close out the game in a few turns. By efficiently controlling the game and applying pressure with the combo, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents before they can properly respond.

The deck focuses on using a combination of counterspells, card draw, and bounce spells to protect and support the Phyrexian Dreadnought, creating a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. Stifle is used to counter triggered abilities, allowing players to cheat the Dreadnought into play with its powerful stats at a low cost. The deck aims to control the game tempo and disrupt opponents while setting up the game-winning combo with the Dreadnought.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction. By using cards like Mana Leak, Counterspell, Swords to Plowshares, and Wrath of God, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining board control through cards like Standstill and Decree of Justice. The inclusion of land destruction cards like Dust Bowl and Powder Keg further adds to the control aspect of the deck, allowing for strategic disruption of the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure the win through careful control and resource management.

This deck focuses on disrupting opponents' strategies through targeted removal spells like Smother and Cabal Therapy, while also using cards like Pernicious Deed and Natural Order to maintain control of the game. The deck also includes versatile creatures like Wall of Roots and Yavimaya Elder to provide defense and ramp. Dust Bowl is used to disrupt opponents' mana bases, while Treetop Village and creatures like Verdant Force and Uktabi Orangutan provide a win condition. The deck aims to outvalue opponents by generating card advantage and consistently controlling the board.

The focus of this deck is to assemble the Stiflenought combo, utilizing cards like Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to prevent the opponent from disrupting the combo. The deck also includes card draw and counter spells to protect the combo and maintain card advantage. The strategy revolves around being able to quickly and efficiently assemble the combo pieces while controlling the game through counterspells and disruptive spells. The goal is to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through a powerful and difficult-to-interact-with combo.

The main concept of this Landstill Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy through counterspells and removal spells, while also controlling the board with land denial tactics. By utilizing cards like Standstill and Mishra's Factory, the deck aims to slow down the game and gain card advantage through cards like Fact or Fiction. With a mix of control elements, card draw, and removal, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and ultimately win by creating favorable board states and leveraging card advantage.

The deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful combo that can win the game quickly. By efficiently countering opponent's spells and disrupting their strategies with cards like Foil and Counterspell, the deck aims to control the game until it can assemble the combo. With card draw and selection tools like Gush, Opt, and Portent, the deck can find the pieces it needs while keeping up its defenses. The inclusion of additional disruptive spells like Chain of Vapor and Thwart further solidifies its control strategy.

This deck focuses on controlling the game with cards like Sphere of Resistance and Swords to Plowshares, while also utilizing Oath of Druids to cheat powerful creatures onto the battlefield. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port, while building up a strong board presence with creatures like Terravore and Treetop Village. By combining control elements with a powerful win condition in Oath of Druids, this deck aims to outlast and out maneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The deck revolves around assembling an aggressive Goblin tribal strategy, aiming to overwhelm opponents with a swarm of small but powerful creatures. Key cards like Goblin Ringleader and Goblin Warchief help generate card advantage and reduce the cost of casting Goblins, while cards like Mogg Fanatic and Siege-Gang Commander help control the board and deal direct damage. The deck also includes disruption in the form of land destruction with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt opponents' game plans. Overall, the deck aims to quickly establish a powerful board presence and close out games before opponents can stabilize.
